parameters.name: active
parameters.label: Active
parameters.description: When 'On' data is captured from the Kinect sensor.

parameters.name: hwversion
parameters.label: Hardware Version
parameters.description: Choose between Kinect  v1 or Kinect v2 sensors.

parameters.name: sensor
parameters.label: Sensor
parameters.description: Selects which Kinect sensor to use. Only available when using Kinect v1.

parameters.name: image
parameters.label: Image
parameters.description: Selects between the Color, Depth, Infrared, Player Index, or Color Cloud modes.

parameters.name: camerares
parameters.label: Camera Resolution
parameters.description: Only used for Kinect 1 devices. Selects the resolution of the camera capture.

parameters.name: skeleton
parameters.label: Skeleton
parameters.description: Only used for Kinect 1 devices. Specify whether to track full skeleton or seated skeleton.

parameters.name: neardepthmode
parameters.label: Near Depth Mode
parameters.description: Only used for Kinect 1 devices. Enables near mode for the depth camera, which allows the depth camera to see objects as close as 40cm to the camera (instead of the default 80cm).

parameters.name: mirrorimage
parameters.label: Mirror Image
parameters.description: Flips the image in the y-axis.

parameters.name: remap
parameters.label: Camera Remap
parameters.description: Only used for Kinect 2 devices. Enabling this will remap images that are natively from the depth camera (Depth, Infrared, Player Index) to be in the space and resolution of the Color camera instead.

parameters.name: tooclosevalue
parameters.label: Too Close Value
parameters.description: Only used for Kinect 1 devices. For depth pixels that are too close to resolve, this pixel value will be output instead.

parameters.name: toofarvalue
parameters.label: Too Far Value
parameters.description: Only used for Kinect 1 devices. For depth pixels that are too far to resolve, this pixel value will be output instead.

parameters.name: unknownvalue
parameters.label: Unknown Value
parameters.description: For depth pixels whose depth can not be determined, output this value instead.

parameters.name: unknownpointvalue
parameters.label: Unknown Point Value
parameters.description: When using the 'Color Cloud' some pixel's position can not be determined. This parameter controls what value to assign those pixels instead.
